Motion For (1) Assignment Of Rights; (2) Restraining Order After Assignment; (3) Turnover Order On Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Barry W. Ferns of Ferns Adams & Associates (925-927-3401) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party, AEL Financial LLC

Attorney, John H. Kendrick (802-598-3910) appears as defendant, In Propria Persona

Court passes this matter and directs the parties to meet and confer in the hallway regarding a payment plan. The matter is later recalled. The parties report no agreement. The cause is argued as set forth on the record. PLAINTIFF AEL FINANCIAL, LLC Motion For (1) Assignment Of Rights; (2) Restraining Order After Assignment; (3) Turnover Order On Writ Of Execution is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Barry W. Ferns of Ferns Adams & Associates (925-927-3401) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party, AEL Financial LLC

Attorney, John H. Kendrick (802-598-3910) appears as defendant, In Propria Persona

Court passes this matter and directs the parties to meet and confer in the hallway regarding a payment plan. The matter is later recalled. The parties report no agreement. The cause is argued as set forth on the record. Claim of exemption of John Halsey Kendrick is DENIED.
Court sets payment schedule at $250.00 per pay period. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Motion For Relief From Failing To Time File Opposition To Defendants Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant, John Halsey Kendrick appears In Propria Persona
No other appearances are made in this action

PLAINTIFF AEL FINANCIAL, LLC'S Motion For Relief From Failing To Time File Opposition To Defendants Claim Of Exemption is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. A hearing on Mr. Kendrick's claim of exemption will be held on July 27, 2016. On or before July 18, 2016 plaintiff must file and serve its opposition to the claim of exemption and provide courtesy copies of the claim of exemption and the opposition thereto to department 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant/Judgment Debtor JOHN HALSEY KENDRICK, Tel No. 802-598-3910 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF AEL FINANCIAL, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, Defendant's claim of exemption is granted. The plaintiff didn't file its papers correctly.
